// <auto-generated />
// This file is auto-generated by Mutty.

#nullable enable

using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Collections.Immutable;
using System.Linq;

namespace Mutty.Tests
{
    /// <summary>
    /// The mutable wrapper for the <see cref="Container"/> record.
    /// </summary>
    public partial class MutableContainer
    {
        private Container _record;

        /// <summary>
        /// Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="MutableContainer"/> class.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="record">The record to wrap.</param>
        public MutableContainer(Container record)
        {
            _record = record;

            Value = _record.Value;
            Label = _record.Label;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Builds a new instance of the <see cref="Container"/> class.
        /// </summary>
        public Container Build()
        {
            OnBeforeBuild();
            return _record with
            {
                Value = this.Value,
                Label = this.Label,
            };
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Builds a new instance of the <see cref="Container"/> record. Alias for <see cref="Build"/>.
        /// </summary>
        public Container ToImmutable()
        {
            return Build();
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Called at the start of <see cref="Build"/>, before the immutable record is produced.
        /// </summary>
        /// Implement this method in a user-defined partial class to validate or normalise state.
        partial void OnBeforeBuild();

        /// <summary>
        /// Performs an implicit conversion from <see cref="Container"/> to <see cref="MutableContainer"/>.
        /// </summary>
        public static implicit operator MutableContainer(Container record)
        {
            return new MutableContainer(record);
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Performs an implicit conversion from <see cref="MutableContainer"/> to <see cref="Container"/>.
        /// </summary>
        public static implicit operator Container(MutableContainer mutable)
        {
            return mutable.Build();
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Gets or sets the Value.
        /// </summary>
        public T Value { get; set; }

        /// <summary>
        /// Gets or sets the Label.
        /// </summary>
        public string Label { get; set; }
    }
}
